headline: Head of Growth at Aviato | intelligent people + company data | API | B2B
current_position_description:
As a Tesla Account Executive, I reached the pinnacle of success by securing one of the top advisory positions within a prestigious Tier 1 Tesla Branch, consistently exceeding our sales goals by an impressive 140%. My commitment to excellence extended to expanding our client portfolio, driving approximately 20% incremental revenue through successful upselling of additional Tesla products.

I showcased my deep product knowledge and expertise by effectively highlighting the comparative advantages of Tesla's offerings, earning the trust of our clientele. Moreover, my analytical skills came into play as I conducted thorough assessments of niche competitors, identifying key differentiators and crafting strategic approaches to maintain our competitive edge.
latest_field_of_study: Marketing/ Brand and Product Management/ Sales Management

As a Tesla Account Executive, I reached the pinnacle of success by securing one of the top advisory positions within a prestigious Tier 1 Tesla Branch, consistently exceeding our sales goals by an impressive 140%. Moreover, my analytical skills came into play as I conducted thorough assessments of niche competitors, identifying key differentiators and crafting strategic approaches to maintain our competitive edge.

positionList.title: Tech Sales Coach - Live Grader
positionList.description:
Springboard is on a mission to bridge the world's skills gap, offering transformative online education in data science, machine learning, UX/UI Design, Coding, and Tech Sales. 

As a Tech Sales Coach – Live Grader, my responsibility was to provide personalized coaching and training to over 100 students within the realm of technology, focusing on skill development, objection handling, and fostering a consultative approach through role playing exercises. In addition, evaluating individual performance using objective criteria, providing feedback and actionable recommendations.

positionList.title: Enterprise Account Executive
positionList.description:
RocketReach is a leader in the contacts data space, revolutionizing the way businesses access and utilize data to connect with others. Our platform empowers organizations of all sizes to effortlessly find and validate across a broad range of industries. With the largest database and our high accuracy rating, our advanced search capabilities offer real-time updates which ensure relevant information at your fingertips. 

RocketReach has over 18 million users worldwide who trust our data. Including the biggest - Google, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Salesforce, Microsoft, Intel, Adobe and 95% of S&P 500. 

Personal Notable Accounts include Fortune 100 & 500 companies. 

• Million Dollar Club
• 91% post close retention rate

positionList.title: Strategic Account Development
positionList.description: Strategic Account Development helping businesses build their brand with our SaaS Commerce Platform.

positionList.title: Sales And Marketing Specialist
positionList.description:
As a Sales and Marketing Specialist, I played a multifaceted role in driving the success of our products. I identified and analyzed product strategies, considering factors such as market trends, competition, pricing, and promotional tactics to influence demand. Leveraging the power of Sellics automation software, I effectively tracked and measured profitability metrics while continually optimizing Advertising Cost of Sales (ACoS).

My contributions extended to significant sales growth, achieving a remarkable 38% month-over-month increase by implementing SEO strategies and closely monitoring PPC campaigns. Additionally, I provided essential support to our operations team, particularly in managing e-commerce sales on Amazon Seller Central. My active involvement in market research ensured the successful launch of new products.

Notably, I prioritized building and nurturing customer relationships, resulting in strengthened brand loyalty. Working collaboratively with our CEO and leadership team, I actively participated in the development of market performance systems and the execution of initiatives aimed at enhancing brand loyalty and increasing overall product visibility.

positionList.title: Sales Development Manager
positionList.description:
As a Sales Development Manager, my primary responsibility was to support leadership in the ongoing expansion and development of our sales organization. In this crucial role within the sales development leadership team, my key objectives included providing continuous coaching and guidance to my direct reports and sales organization, as well as defining and meticulously tracking key performance indicators (KPIs). Additionally, I played a pivotal role in spearheading two significant enablement projects focused on enhancing our Sales Development Representative (SDR) ramp-up process, optimizing licensing procedures, refining our sales strategy, and streamlining Standard Operating Procedures (SOP). These initiatives were essential in ensuring the effectiveness and efficiency of our sales development efforts.

• Led a high performing sales development team of 12 individuals that consistently ranked in the top 6%
• Utilized data and performance metrics to make informed decisions, optimizing team outcome
• Collaborated with senior leadership to build out standard operating procedures (SOP) for managers and individual contributors to meet objectives, quality management control, and compliance assurance
• Conducted weekly 1:1 performance reviews with team members, ensuring alignment with KPI targets
• Partnered with directors to implement and present new sales trainings driving upwards scalability

positionList.title: Senior Account Manager
positionList.description:
As a Senior Account Executive, I assisted in leading a high-performing sales team to exceptional success, consistently exceeding revenue targets and driving a collaborative and motivated environment. My role involved not only achieving individual sales goals but also coaching and mentoring team members to optimize their performance. I fostered strong client relationships, resulting in a substantial client retention rate and the expansion of our customer base. My leadership extended to strategic planning and execution, where I played a key role in shaping sales strategies and ensuring the team's alignment with organizational objectives.

• Managed a portfolio, achieving total sales volume over $3.2 million, ranked within top 5% of performers
• Fostered relationships with clients leading to an 87% post-close retention resulting in monthly growth
• Conducted file audits to analyze and pinpoint areas of opportunity for fine-tuning/ sales optimization
• Develop data-driven strategies to uncover ​​and create or improve upon existing practices and processes
• Identify and provide input into new initiatives process/workflow improvements and program changes
• Illustrate the value of products and services to create growth opportunities; compile, analyze data 
  to identify trends - optimize business 

Awards: Circle of Excellence
